name: Mailchimp
description: Access Mailchimp marketing data including campaigns, audiences, subscribers, templates, and reports through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires a Mailchimp API key.

Admin setup:
1. Log in to your Mailchimp account
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner
3. Go to Account & billing > Extras > API keys
4. Click 'Create A Key' and copy the generated key
5. The API key includes a data center suffix (e.g., xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx-us1)
6. Enter the full API key (including the -usXX suffix) in the server configuration

The API key provides access to all data the account owner can access. For limited access, create a key from a user account with restricted permissions.

Mailchimp also supports OAuth 2.0 (auth URL: https://login.mailchimp.com/oauth2/authorize, token URL: https://login.mailchimp.com/oauth2/token) for public app integrations. This template uses API key authentication for simpler setup.

Note: This server provides read-only access to Mailchimp Marketing API data. For write operations, consider using a more comprehensive MCP server implementation.

Note: Intuit (Mailchimp's parent company) is partnering with Anthropic
to bring official MCP integrations for Mailchimp.
A transactional messaging MCP is available at https://mandrillapp.com/mcp
Full integration expected spring 2026.
